prioritized_items.title: Explicit stop-condition remediation checklist
prioritized_items.why_it_matters: Operators lose time mapping blockers to required evidence and reviewers after blocked runs.

dependency_notes: Keep BATCH-Z fail-closed invariants unchanged while improving operator-facing guidance.

trust_gain.justification: Top items make blocked outcomes explainable and trace-linked from one artifact view.

operator_time_saved.justification: Checklist + stronger summary fields reduce manual artifact triage per cycle.
